action_input.code:
import pandas as pd

# Read member data
member_data = pd.read_csv('csv/member.csv')

# Read zip code data
zip_code_data = pd.read_json('json/zip_code.json')

# Extract the 'records' data
records_data = pd.DataFrame(zip_code_data['records'].tolist())

# Perform the join operation
joined_data = pd.merge(member_data, records_data, left_on='zip', right_on='zip_code', how='left')

# Display the first few rows of the joined data
joined_data.head(5).to_dict()

action_input.code:
import pandas as pd

# Read member data
member_data = pd.read_csv('csv/member.csv')

# Read zip code data
zip_code_data = pd.read_json('json/zip_code.json')

# Extract the 'records' data
records_data = pd.DataFrame(zip_code_data['records'].tolist())

# Perform the join operation
joined_data = pd.merge(member_data, records_data, left_on='zip', right_on='zip_code', how='left')

# Filter members who grew up in Illinois state
illinois_members = joined_data[joined_data['state'] == 'Illinois']

# Display the filtered members
illinois_members[['member_id', 'first_name', 'last_name', 'zip', 'state']].to_dict()

action_input.code:
import pandas as pd

# Read member data
member_data = pd.read_csv('csv/member.csv')

# Read zip code data
zip_code_data = pd.read_json('json/zip_code.json')

# Extract the 'records' data
records_data = pd.DataFrame(zip_code_data['records'].tolist())

# Perform the join operation
joined_data = pd.merge(member_data, records_data, left_on='zip', right_on='zip_code', how='left')

# Filter members who grew up in Illinois state
illinois_members = joined_data[joined_data['state'] == 'Illinois']

# Display the filtered members
illinois_members[['member_id', 'first_name', 'last_name', 'zip', 'state']].to_dict()

# Read member data
member_data = pd.read_csv('csv/member.csv')

# Read zip code data
zip_code_data = pd.read_json('json/zip_code.json')

# Extract the 'records' data
records_data = pd.DataFrame(zip_code_data['records'].tolist())
